sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَ أَحْمَدُ إِلَى مُقَابَلَةِ عَمَلٍ جَدِيدَةٍ صَبَاحَ الْيَوْمِ.
sentences.translation: Ahmed je jutros otišao na razgovor za novi posao.
sentences.translationEn: Ahmed went to a new job interview this morning.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ يَرْتَدِي مَلَابِسَ رَسْمِيَّةً وَيَشْعُرُ بِالْحَمَاسِ.
sentences.translation: Nosio je formalnu odjeću i osjećao se uzbuđeno.
sentences.translationEn: He was wearing formal clothes and felt excited.

sentences.arabic: أَجَابَ عَنِ الْأَسْئِلَةِ بِثِقَةٍ وَتَحَدَّثَ عَنْ مَهَارَاتِهِ.
sentences.translation: Samouvjereno je odgovarao na pitanja i pričao o svojim vještinama.
sentences.translationEn: He answered the questions confidently and talked about his skills.

sentences.arabic: فِي النِّهَايَةِ، شَكَرَ الْمُدِيرَ عَلَى هَذِهِ الْفُرْصَةِ.
sentences.translation: Na kraju se zahvalio direktoru na ovoj prilici.
sentences.translationEn: In the end, he thanked the manager for this opportunity.
